# 模拟串口输入数据
# 每行作为一条模拟数据发送，每 500ms 发送一行
# 支持 hex（如 01020304 或 01 02 03 04）或普通文本
# 以 # 开头的行会被忽略

[2026-03-14 15:00:00.000] join NET success
[2026-03-14 15:00:00.500] Time Slot index: 1 join NET success
[2026-03-14 15:00:01.000] Time Slot index: 1 client start!
[2026-03-14 15:00:01.500] 

[2026-03-14 15:00:02.000] offset:0.0001000  Delay:0.01000001
[2026-03-14 15:00:02.500] offset:0.0001000  Delay:0.01000001
[2026-03-14 15:00:03.000] offset:0.0001000  Delay:0.01000001
[2026-03-14 15:00:03.500] offset:0.0001000  Delay:0.01000001
[2026-03-14 15:00:04.000] offset:0.0001000  Delay:0.01000001
[2026-03-14 15:00:04.500] offset:0.0001000  Delay:0.01000001
[2026-03-14 15:00:05.000] offset:0.0001000  Delay:0.01000001
